mapper.select:
select t.PLAYER_NAME,t.PLAYER_NUMBER,s.* from dream_player t right join (select * from player_stats where SEASON_NUM = #{param.seasonNum} ) s on t.PLAYER_ID = s.PLAYER_ID
and s.PLAYER_POSITION like CONCAT('%',#{param.playerPosition},'%')
and s.PLAYER_TEAM like CONCAT('%',#{param.playerTeam},'%')
order by ${param.field}
order by s.PLAYER_AVG_SCORE desc

select award, season from ( select 'scoring' as award, ps.SEASON_NUM as season from player_stats ps where ps.PLAYER_ID = #{playerId} and ps.SEASON_NUM < 50 and ps.PLAYER_AVG_SCORE is not null
and ps.PLAYER_AVG_SCORE * LEAST(IFNULL(ps.PLAYER_APPEARANCE, 0), 58) / 58 >= (select max(p2.PLAYER_AVG_SCORE) from player_stats p2 where p2.SEASON_NUM = ps.SEASON_NUM and IFNULL(p2.PLAYER_APPEARANCE, 0) >= 58) union all select 'rebounds', ps.SEASON_NUM from player_stats ps where ps.PLAYER_ID = #{playerId} and ps.SEASON_NUM < 50 and ps.PLAYER_AVG_REB is not null
and ps.PLAYER_AVG_REB * LEAST(IFNULL(ps.PLAYER_APPEARANCE, 0), 58) / 58 >= (select max(p2.PLAYER_AVG_REB) from player_stats p2 where p2.SEASON_NUM = ps.SEASON_NUM and IFNULL(p2.PLAYER_APPEARANCE, 0) >= 58) union all select 'assists', ps.SEASON_NUM from player_stats ps where ps.PLAYER_ID = #{playerId} and ps.SEASON_NUM < 50 and ps.PLAYER_AVG_ASS is not null
and ps.PLAYER_AVG_ASS * LEAST(IFNULL(ps.PLAYER_APPEARANCE, 0), 58) / 58 >= (select max(p2.PLAYER_AVG_ASS) from player_stats p2 where p2.SEASON_NUM = ps.SEASON_NUM and IFNULL(p2.PLAYER_APPEARANCE, 0) >= 58) union all select 'steals', ps.SEASON_NUM from player_stats ps where ps.PLAYER_ID = #{playerId} and ps.SEASON_NUM < 50 and ps.PLAYER_AVG_STEAL is not null
and ps.PLAYER_AVG_STEAL * LEAST(IFNULL(ps.PLAYER_APPEARANCE, 0), 58) / 58 >= (select max(p2.PLAYER_AVG_STEAL) from player_stats p2 where p2.SEASON_NUM = ps.SEASON_NUM and IFNULL(p2.PLAYER_APPEARANCE, 0) >= 58) union all select 'blocks', ps.SEASON_NUM from player_stats ps where ps.PLAYER_ID = #{playerId} and ps.SEASON_NUM < 50 and ps.PLAYER_AVG_BLOCK is not null
and ps.PLAYER_AVG_BLOCK * LEAST(IFNULL(ps.PLAYER_APPEARANCE, 0), 58) / 58 >= (select max(p2.PLAYER_AVG_BLOCK) from player_stats p2 where p2.SEASON_NUM = ps.SEASON_NUM and IFNULL(p2.PLAYER_APPEARANCE, 0) >= 58) ) t order by season

select t.PLAYER_NAME,t.PLAYER_NUMBER,s.* from dream_player t right join (select * from player_playoff_stats where SEASON_NUM = #{param.seasonNum} ) s on t.PLAYER_ID = s.PLAYER_ID
and s.PLAYER_POSITION like CONCAT('%',#{param.playerPosition},'%')
and s.PLAYER_TEAM like CONCAT('%',#{param.playerTeam},'%')
order by ${param.field}
order by s.PLAYER_AVG_SCORE desc

select t.PLAYER_NAME, t.PLAYER_NUMBER, ts.PLAYOFF_RESULT as playoffResult, s.* from player_playoff_stats s left join dream_player t on t.PLAYER_ID = s.PLAYER_ID left join team_season ts on ts.SEASON_NUM = s.SEASON_NUM and ts.TEAM_CODE = SUBSTRING_INDEX(s.PLAYER_TEAM, '->', -1) where s.PLAYER_ID = #{playerId} order by s.SEASON_NUM
select AWARD as award, SEASON_NUM as season from season_award where PLAYER_ID = #{playerId} order by SEASON_NUM

select sa.AWARD as award, sa.PLAYER_ID as playerId, dp.PLAYER_NAME as playerName, ps.PLAYER_TEAM as playerTeam, ps.PLAYER_POSITION as playerPosition, ps.PLAYER_AVG_SCORE as pts, ps.PLAYER_AVG_REB as reb, ps.PLAYER_AVG_ASS as ast, pp.PLAYER_AVG_SCORE as poPts, pp.PLAYER_AVG_REB as poReb, pp.PLAYER_AVG_ASS as poAst, pv.PLAYER_AVG_SCORE as prevPts, pv.PLAYER_AVG_REB as prevReb, pv.PLAYER_AVG_ASS as prevAst from season_award sa left join dream_player dp on dp.PLAYER_ID = sa.PLAYER_ID left join player_stats ps on ps.PLAYER_ID = sa.PLAYER_ID and ps.SEASON_NUM = sa.SEASON_NUM left join player_playoff_stats pp on pp.PLAYER_ID = sa.PLAYER_ID and pp.SEASON_NUM = sa.SEASON_NUM left join player_stats pv on pv.PLAYER_ID = sa.PLAYER_ID and pv.SEASON_NUM = sa.SEASON_NUM - 1 where sa.SEASON_NUM = #{seasonNum}

select ts.SEASON_NUM as season, ts.TEAM_CODE as team from team_season ts join player_stats ps on ps.SEASON_NUM = ts.SEASON_NUM and SUBSTRING_INDEX(ps.PLAYER_TEAM, '->', -1) = ts.TEAM_CODE where ps.PLAYER_ID = #{playerId} and ts.PLAYOFF_RESULT = '总冠军' order by ts.SEASON_NUM
